extract: Wishiwashi (Japanese: ヨワシ Yowashi) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Wishiwashi can change forms with its Schooling Ability if it has reached level 20. When it enters a battle or ends a turn with its HP above 25%, it changes from its Solo Form to its School Form. It will revert back to its Solo Form if its HP is below 25%.
